programme.desc: Omphile fakes her identity on social media to find love. She ends up finding love with the right person, but how long will she continue living a lie?

programme.title: Imizamo Yethu
programme.desc: A dedicated matriculant has some money saved up for her dream dress, only for her mother to steal her money. She is forced to find ways to get a dress before the dance.

programme.title: Bohloko Baka
programme.desc: After she discovers that her husband has been unfaithful, a woman takes her husband's pregnant lover hostage. With every passing second their lives hang in the balance.

programme.title: Mbalenhle
programme.desc: A young girl faces life's tribulations in her poverty-stricken community. She pushes against obstacles in order to achieve her goal of being educated and independent.

programme.title: Lekgarebe
programme.desc: A young man is preparing to marry the love of his life when he discovers the child his soon-to-be wife is carrying is not his.

programme.title: Isinamuva
programme.desc: A father's dying wish is for his son to marry his friend's daughter. However, a long-buried family secret creeps up to the surface, revealing true intentions.

programme.title: Inkinga Uben
programme.desc: What began as a mission to stop her husband's wandering eye turns into a journey of self-discovery for a woman in a polygamous marriage.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Nyale
programme.desc: A young woman receives a rude awakening when the will her father left reveals that she can only get her inheritance after she gets married.

programme.title: Basebenzi
programme.desc: When an assertive manager is tasked with turning around the misfortunes of a failing hotel in Soweto, she finds herself embarking on a journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Dadwethu
programme.desc: After her husband cheats on her with her sister, a young woman decides to give them another chance. Unfortunately, her sister isn't one to give up easily.

programme.title: Umhlanga
programme.desc: A young girl and dedicated policeman go on a frantic search for her sister after she disappeared during the annual reed dance.

programme.title: The Certificate
programme.desc: A street hustler must return home to bury his beloved sister but there's one problem: a dangerous loan shark is on his tail.

programme.title: Ingane Ka Baba
programme.desc: A teenage boy tries to prove that his alcoholic father was wrongfully accused of a murder, while also trying to save his parents' marriage.

programme.title: Tshenyeho Masisa Pelo
programme.desc: Thabo wants to pursue his dream of marrying his childhood lover, Mpho. Things get out of hand when Mpho's stepmother decides to sell her to a rich man in exchange for money.

programme.title: Manong
programme.desc: A 16-year-old boy has been looking forward to finally buying his long-awaited bicycle. After months of saving his lunch money and buying the bicycle, it gets stolen.

programme.title: Gog'flo
programme.desc: Gog'Flo is assumed the evil village witch. After her twin sister set her up, the village cast her out, but her absence opens the village up to a series of misfortunes.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Love Specialist
programme.desc: A con man tricks a married couple into believing that he's a love specialist and can help bring the spark back to their relationship.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Love Specialist
programme.desc: A con man tricks a married couple into believing that he's a love specialist and can help bring the spark back to their relationship.

programme.title: Ukholo
programme.desc: After being dumped by his wife on their anniversary, a decent man becomes depressed, until a kind voice nurses his faith back to life.

programme.title: Uthando Lwababili
programme.desc: A young man is caught between his family and his opinionated girlfriend. Is he going to choose the woman of his dreams or stick to what his family wants for him?

programme.title: Mapetla
programme.desc: Three girls find themselves faced with the hardship of township life. It seems their only way out of this life is through promiscuity.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Love Specialist
programme.desc: A con man tricks a married couple into believing that he's a love specialist and can help bring the spark back to their relationship.

programme.title: Isipho Sothando
programme.desc: A young and naïve couple from notorious money laundering families put their lives in danger when they choose to stay together, despite their families' disapproval.

programme.title: Kgaratlho
programme.desc: After losing her job, a young mother is seduced into a relationship with a man who promises to take care of her every need. But at what cost?

programme.title: Umfelokazi
programme.desc: A man's business is in a terrible state when a stranger convinces the wife into killing her husband so they can share his investment. Will she do it?

programme.title: Umfelokazi 2
programme.desc: After being punished for killing her husband, a young woman tries to re-enter civilian life as quietly as possible, that's until her hunger for revenge is triggered.

programme.title: Umfelokazi 3
programme.desc: In the third installment, Mlungisi is determined to take down Mike and has his lawyer friend and former gangster father to help him. Will they succeed?

programme.title: Black Tax
programme.desc: On the outside, Thato looks like he has his life together. However, the truth is that he's drowning in debt.

programme.title: Uthandiwe Uyatshata
programme.desc: A princess with an explosive secret sacrifices her happiness to save her true love from her father and the kingdom's wrath.

programme.title: Isibonakaliso
programme.desc: When a family moves to their newly bought farm, the youngest daughter starts having nightmares and hearing voices. Could the farm be haunted?

programme.title: One Coffin
programme.desc: A funeral parlour owner is in desperate need of heart surgery. He decides to steal and re-use the coffin he buries his clients in to fund the procedure.

programme.title: Ubambo Lwami
programme.desc: A gifted runner's dream for Olympic gold is dashed when he breaks his leg. A young physiotherapist could be his only hope for another shot at success.

programme.title: Zimele
programme.desc: After the death of her father, a young girl finds herself at the mercy of her cruel stepmother and stepsister, who reduce her to an ordinary labourer.

programme.title: Dark Intensions
programme.desc: Lucille's nightmare begins when a young lady claims to be her husband's daughter from his previous marriage. She begins to question her motive when she moves in with them.

programme.title: Lentswe
programme.desc: A local film set during the pandemic. A lady falls in love with a voice behind a mask at a grocery store. When they meet it's not what she expected.

programme.title: Makoti
programme.desc: A woman agrees to marry an ageing woman's supposedly deceased son. However, he suddenly returns home: alive and with a pregnant wife, which throws a spanner in the works.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Taron Egerton and Jamie Foxx turn the age-old tale on its head in this movie. A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander lead a revolt against the corrupt English crown.

programme.title: Madness In The Method
programme.desc: Jason Mewes turns satire on its head with this crime comedy about himself. Desperate to break out as a serious actor, he gets hold of a book about method acting, changing his life.

programme.title: Stage Mother
programme.desc: A music-filled dramedy Jacki Weaver, Lucy Liu and Adrian Grenier. A conservative church choir director inherits her late son's San Francisco drag club.

programme.title: Glory Game: The Joost Van Der...
programme.desc: 'Glory Game: The Joost Van Der Westhuizen Story'. Exploring the late former Springbok Joost van der Westhuizen's life story of glory, redemption, and human frailty.

programme.title: I Am Mortal
programme.desc: A gripping sci-fi set 200 years in the future when humanity has achieved immortality. But a small band of rebels seeks to overthrow the status quo and reclaim their right to die.

programme.title: Get On Up
programme.desc: This thrilling biographical movie follows the extraordinary life of James Brown, from extreme poverty to the dizzying heights of the music world.

programme.title: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: Silly slapstick comedy starring Eddie Griffin, as an undercover spy who must foil the plans of a man who wants to reduce the entire population into mindless zombies.

programme.title: Jingle All The Way
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger stars in this frantic Christmas comedy, as a dad trying to buy his son a Turbo Man toy on Christmas eve, just as everybody in town is trying to get one too.

programme.title: Judy Moody And The Not Bummer Summer
programme.desc: It's adventure all the way in this film. A sister and her brother set out to have the most exciting summer with their fun loving aunt.

programme.title: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Post-apocalyptic adventure from Peter Jackson. In a world where mobile cities consume each other to survive, a trio of outcasts become entangled in a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Lady Driver
programme.desc: A feisty motorsports drama. When a rebellious teen embarks on a journey to connect with her roots, she finds herself in a new world, geared up for the ride of her life.

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: This biopic about race and identity won the Best Picture Oscar. An Italian-American bouncer becomes a driver for an African-American classical pianist touring the 1960s South.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: A wedding gets turned on its head in this outrageously funny comedy. A rivalry between a maid of honour and a bridesmaid for the bride's affection leads to all sorts of chaos.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: Owen Wilson and Pierce Brosnan must fight against all odds in order to survive in this intense thriller. A family are caught in the middle of a coup and must escape to safety.

programme.title: Pearls Of Wisdom
programme.desc: Nhlakanipho's dreams come true when she's accepted to the Johannesburg School of the Arts. But she soon realises that's just the first step, and she'll have to face her own demons.

programme.title: Blue Crush
programme.desc: Kate Bosworth and Michelle Rodriguez are best friends in this breezy drama. A surfer-girl prepares for a tough competition, but finds herself getting distracted by romance.

programme.title: Camp Arrowhead
programme.desc: A heartfelt family film about loss. After losing her mom, Sophie attends a summer camp, where she joins the archery team and deals with her grief in an unexpected and magical way.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
programme.desc: A man's perfect world is turned upside down when his wife leaves him. Now single, he enlists the help of a so-called ladies' man to navigate the unfamiliar dating scene.

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: A powerful movie about change based on a true story. A struggling inner-city mother sacrifices everything to get her son out of a dangerous school and give him a good education.

programme.title: Max Winslow And The House Of Secrets
programme.desc: A thrilling sci-fi from the four-time Emmy winner Sean Olson. It's man versus machine when five teenagers compete to win a billionaire's smart mansion.

programme.title: Mad About Mambo
programme.desc: Sport and dance meet in this romcom. A teenager takes up Mambo classes to try and improve is football timing, but instead falls for his dance partner.

programme.title: The Son Of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A delightful animated adventure. A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father - only to discover that he's Bigfoot.

programme.title: Sleeper Agent
programme.desc: Comedian Leland Klassen stars in this hilarious spy film. Stuck in a meaningless job, Walter Goertzen's childhood dream of being a spy 'sort of' comes true.

programme.title: Life On The Line
programme.desc: A high voltage drama starring John Travolta. A group of men have the deadly job of repairing the electrical grid, but a storm makes it even more deadly.

programme.title: Bloody Tales Of Europe
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Monsters'. From one of Rome's most feared emperors to Hungary's Countess Dracula, Dr Suzannah and Joe team up to investigate three extraordinary stories.

programme.title: X-Ray Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Seattle Mega Quake'. X-raying the Earth reveals a fault off of the Pacific Northwest coast, when it slips, it will generate a megaquake and tsunami that will devastate the region.

programme.title: Wild Fish
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Off The Hook'. After being left alone in hostile territory, it's a fight to the finish for Cyril and his team as they search for the giant Piraiba.

programme.title: History: The Interesting Bits
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - How To Make A Fortune'. Meet history's richest people - how did they get it, how did they spend it, and were they happy?

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 of 20'. In this episode we learn all about icebergs, the many ways to hurt yourself jumping off a pier, and what to watch out for the next time you are biking over a teeter totter.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S6/E14 of 20'. In this engineering special we discover the secrets behind explosive demolitions, exactly how dams work, and what you need to look out for when operating a ladder.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S7/E9 of 20'. In this episode we learn the science behind the fails when mogul skiing, attempting to throw someone in the air, and running on floating logs.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S7/E10 of 20'. In this episode we learn the science behind the fails when attempting a doughnut spin on an ATV, riding river rapids, and working out with medicine balls.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Citroen DS'. Tim and Fuzz take a trip to Northern France to collect 94-year-old wartime hero Roger's 1968 Citroen DS, a car he has owned from new.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Chocolate Pretzels & Jam'. Featuring Welch's Concord Grape Jam, grandma-perfected pierogies, and flipping delicious chocolate-covered pretzels.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - McMuffins & Manischewitz'. Discover how to make Egg McMuffins, find out what it takes to farm and shuck oysters, and visit the home of America's top-selling kosher wine.

programme.title: First Alaskans
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - It Takes A Village'. When Russians arrived in Alaska in the 18th century, its native peoples had been there for thousands of years developing ways to thrive in the harshest of environments.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: 'S10/E11 - Bad Fish, Good Blood'. Hot Tuna gets help from Bad Fish to help increase profits by catching bluefin for their family business and move out of the middle of the pack.

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler: JFK Airport
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Coke In The Coat'. From intercepting a family smuggling heroin to finding what's triggering radiation alarms, these US customs officers are ready for the challenge.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - Ostriches And Go Karts'. Leaping through windows, hoops or narrow gaps can look very cool if done right, but when done wrong, it's embarrassing. Running up a slope can be tricky too...

programme.title: Tut's Toxic Tomb

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - SoCal Killers'. A seductress motivated by greed, lust and pride convinces tycoons that she loves them - and not just their bank accounts. But how far will she go to claim her reward?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - The Body In The Swamp'. Miami businessman Henry Diaz goes missing the night before a family vacation. His business success has earned him many enemies - even within his own family.

programme.title: Cooks Vs. Cons
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Ballpark BBQ'. The cooks and cons fuse corn and hot dogs. Then they're asked to make their best dish incorporating barbecue to impress judges Daphne Oz and Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Breaking Point'. Tia must intervene when a lazy parolee causes tempers to flare at Villalobos. Meanwhile, Jake is determined to find a home for a unique looking pit bull.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Mission Of Mercy'. Tania and Mariah head to New Orleans for an emotional rescue. Plus, Tia attempts to save an injured pit bull from the side of a busy highway.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Devastation'. Tia and her son brave a fierce thunderstorm to rescue a pit bull in Louisiana. Back at Villalobos, the parolees deal with a rattlesnake infestation.

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia
programme.desc: 'S12/E18 - D.O.A.'. When trainee agent Derrick Schlitter responds to an emergency call in north Philadelphia, he ends up seeking justice for a puppy left dead in a backyard.

programme.title: Cooks Vs. Cons
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 - Nacho Average Cook'. The pros and amateurs get fresh when they incorporate peppermint into a breakfast hash. Plus, can they impress the judges with their best dish using nachos?

programme.title: Cooks Vs. Cons
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - The Whole Enchilada'. The cooks and cons create their best enchilada dishes using cereal. Can judges work out the contestants' identities when choosing who made the best celery dish?

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S10/E1 - Thanksgiving, SoCal-Style'. Valerie Bertinelli makes a traditional Thanksgiving meal with a Southern California twist. On the menu are turkey, sweet potato and stuffing, SoCal-style!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - Reinventing Fall Foods'. Valerie puts a twist on her fall brunch menu. She treats guests including chef Ludo Lefebvre to a meal full of seasonal treats for a long holiday weekend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Saving Tia Torres'. Mariah and Tania put on a fundraiser to help keep the ranch afloat. Meanwhile, Tia tries to rescue a protective pit bull mother and her litter of puppies.

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia

programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. A cooking reality competition celebrating the traditional South African Sunday feast. Two teams cook to impress celebrity judges Mam Lilian Dube and Moshe Ndiki.

programme.title: The Big Bozza Cook-off
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. In this episode, our two chefs go head-to-head to impress our Bozza foodies with a main meal consisting of Mopani worms and a sweet dish using caster sugar.

programme.title: Hair To The Throne
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Four hopeful hair designers are left to design, style and cut their way to the throne. This week, two of the four remaining contestants go head-to-head for a chance to stay in the game.

programme.title: Yes! Ndio! Beeni!: Kenya
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. A top team of event planners help a man propose to the love of his life. Will the unforgettable proposal be good enough to get a yes?

programme.title: Utatakho
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Whether it's a father who refuses to acknowledge his child or a mother who wants to prove her child's paternity, we focus on resolving issues of paternity using DNA testing.

programme.title: This Money Will Change My Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Three contestants compete for the opportunity to win a life changing mount of money that will steer their life in a new direction. Studio guest get to decide who fate to change through votes.

programme.title: Yes, I Have HIV: South Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. People reveal their status to their close family and friends for the first time, with the support of our host who has lived with virus for decades.

programme.title: Will He Say Yes?
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Gugulami and Gugulethu met five years ago at a pub. Now things have progressed from just dating to a fully-fledged relationship, Gugulami is ready to say I do. A proposal is on the cards, but will he say yes?

programme.title: The Buzz
programme.desc: 'S7/E4'. MK from South Africa is ready to settle down but is confused about whether to do it for love or for money.

programme.title: OPW: The Remix
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. In this fast-paced and humorous series, we revisit some of the continent's most memorable and jaw-dropping wedding moments from the popular series.

programme.title: Pastors' Wives
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. We meet the women who keep it together in well-known religious households. This reality show reveals all the opulence, difficulties and drama that you were wondering about.

programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - The Ballad of the Hopediah Plantar/Anne Hunter'. Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero backfire when he stands up to the wrong family. Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E98 - Qilin'. Because of one of Marinette's careless mistakes, one of her closest relatives is akumatized into Qilin, a fearsome supervillain. Will Ladybug dare to fight her?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E100 - Empheral'. What if Ladybug and Cat Noir found out about each other's secret identities?

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - The Haunting of Mission Creek High'. Fed up with Trent bullying him, Leo scares him by saying the school has a ghost. Then he discovers it may be true: is the school haunted by a former janitor?

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Robot Fight Club'. Chase and Leo won't let Davenport help them in a battle bot building competition, so he enters his own bot, and they end up face-to-face in a fight to the finish.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Gargoyle Gals, Supermarket Scandal'. Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life. Cricket can't fulfil an order for veg. What will he do?

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Wax Museum/ Swamp and Sensibility'. A friend reappears. The family visits a mystery shack.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - True Colors'. The gang travels to Newtopia to say their goodbyes and finally send all three girls home. However, someone has other plans.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E36 - Take This Job And Love It'. Roxy is over-protective and her attitude spoils Miley's date. Miley persuades her to take a security job with the US president, believing that will suit Roxy better.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E98 - Qilin'. Because of one of Marinette's careless mistakes, one of her closest relatives is akumatized into Qilin, a fearsome supervillain. Will Ladybug dare to fight her?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Cricket's Shoes, Feud Fight'. Cricket is sick, so the family pitches in to take over his chores. After the manager of a local store tries to steal the Greens' business, Cricket starts a feud.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E85 - Clique Bait'. Booker tries to impress a girl, but it takes a turn for the worse. Raven attempts to prove to Victor that Alice is lying to him about something but he doesn't believe her.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E86 - 5/86'. When valuable items go missing at school, Booker, Ivy, and Neil play detective to catch the culprit. In the meantime, wanting to be cool leaves Victor hanging on for dear life.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Festival of Lights/Saving Christmas'. The Ghost and Molly McGee follows exuberant tween Molly McGee and a grumpy ghost named Scratch. When one of Scratch's spells backfires, the two become bound to each other forever.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Ice Princess / Ready, Set, Snow!'. The Ghost and Molly McGee follows exuberant tween Molly McGee and a grumpy ghost named Scratch. When one of Scratch's spells backfires, the two become bound to each other forever.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - !chisme! !chisme! Read All About It!'. When an anonymous gossip blogger at school starts spilling embarassing secrets, Violet resorts to questionable measures to stop them.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Once Upon a Time'. Griffin Campbell and his family move to a new town and take ownership of an abandoned hotel in hopes of restoring it back to the lively vacation destination it once was.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - Achy Jakey Heart 1'. Jake returns to Malibu, eager to re-kindle his relationship with Miley. It's not easy, but they become an item again and she confides her secret identity to him.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Hurty Tooth, Sleepover Sisters'. Cricket tries to avoid the dentist, while Bill struggles with a puzzle in the waiting room. Tilly and Andromeda have a sleepover and try to stay up all night

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Trailer Trouble, Mansion Madness'. Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Leo's Jam'. Leo wants to take a cute girl called Danielle to a dance, but his friends' attempts to help him backfire when she falls for each of them in turn.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Exoskeleton Vs Grandma'. Leo tries to help Davenport's annual fund- raising video conference by fixing a malfunctioning exo-skeleton suit. But it runs amok, convincing Grandma the house isn't safe.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - The Things They Say About Alice'. Alice is nervous about her first day at Evermoor High, but when a magic splinter causes rumours about Alice to come true, she finds herself turning into a rock star on a rampage...

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Miniature Golf'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Al Jazeera The Stream
programme.desc: The online community uses social media to seek out unheard voices and fresh insights into the most compelling stories on the internet today.

programme.title: The Social - Isingqi SabaPostile
programme.desc: We bring you different choirs that showcase Isingqi Sobupostile (Rhythm of The Apostolic Churches). We showcase choral, male and female voices, and display Isingqi Sabapostile which is known as Uxhwane.

programme.title: Africa Eye
programme.desc: Untold stories in a fresh contemporary style. With journalists across Africa and a brand new BBC investigations unit, we will generate high-impact TV documentaries that expose true stories viewers won't want to miss.

programme.title: Soweto Business Line
programme.desc: Through this show, we promote the growth of our township economy by profiling various businesses that have succeeded in this environment.

programme.title: iWhiz Home School

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - It Came From A Tick'. In North Carolina, debilitating pain and nausea haunt a mother for more than four years. When doctors finally find the culprit, it sends everyone reeling.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Choosing Between Life And Limb'. In Illinois, a newly engaged man mysteriously collapses and faces organ failure. His fiancé gazes in horror as he must choose between life and limb.

programme.title: Love in Paradise: The Caribbean
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Club Can't Handle Me'. Daniele discovers Yohan has been keeping a secret. Carlos feels disrespected when VaLentine takes things too far. Sherlon changes his first diaper.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Saving For A Rainy Day'. The Watsons get cheap engagement photos, and Ashley and Colby try to conceive. Becky Guiles looks for cheap ways to tear down a wall.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S8/E9 - Pickleball And Perms'. Jonah prepares for the upcoming trip to the annual little people's conference. Meanwhile, the girls speculate on the reason Brice can't move in with Elizabeth.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S4/E22 - A Holistic Delivery'. After months of ailments, Yesica visits a holistic healer who discovers a baby's heartbeat. She rushes to the hospital where doctors find she's fully dilated.

programme.title: Long Island Medium
programme.desc: 'S7/E9 - Star Studded Spirit'. Theresa gives readings to comedian Rosie O'Donnell, Oscar-winning actress Mo'Nique, and 'Mike & Molly' star Billy Gardell.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S7/E7 - Are You Happy Now'. Life after the 90 days continues. As the couples look back at their journey, the newlyweds realise that their lives have not become easier.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Did Somebody Shrink You?'. Emma and Alex are given a go-kart to practice their driving skills. But Elizabeth isn't pleased to see her younger siblings behind the wheel.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - What's Cooking, Good Looking?'. Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up. Meanwhile, a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Are You Gonna Marry Liz?'. Liz's best little people friends come to visit - with questions for her boyfriend. And, Trent tries to join in on the success of his kids' online shops.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chasing Waterfalls'. The Johnstons spend time with Jonah's girlfriend and her family. The parents push for them to consider their future, but is it too much too fast?

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Lies And Ex-Wives'. Stacey and Darcey secretly meet up with Georgi's ex-wife and are shocked by what she has to say. Plus, Mike takes Aniko and Aspen to look at cars.

programme.title: Curvy Brides' Boutique
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - The Nikita L Episode'. Nikita's dad has terminal cancer and fears he may not make her wedding in Cyprus. Having overcome mental illness, Lauren now seeks her dream wedding dress.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Tell All Part 2 (4)'. The couples from this season meet for a dramatic showdown. Host Shaun Robinson discusses their most intense moments, with some shocking reveals.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant

programme.desc: 'Enjoying Everyday Life With Joyce Meyer'. Joyce Meyer has a television broadcast that is designed to preach the gospel to every nation, every day. We are able to reach millions of people around the world with the love of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Winning Ways With Matthew Ashimolowo
programme.desc: Pastor Ashimolowo uses his dynamic gift as a pastor, teacher, mentor, businessman and spiritual father to inspire people to grow up in knowledge, grow big in the Great Commission and grow together in unity.

programme.title: Living Life With Theo Wolmarans
programme.desc: Theo and Beverley Wolmarans wants to bring people into the family of Jesus Christ, develop them into Christian maturity and equip them for their ministry in the church in order to magnify God and His Holy Name.

programme.title: The Gospel Truth With Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Teaching the truth of the Gospel to the body of Christ with special emphasis on God's unconditional love and the balance between grace and faith.

programme.title: No More Curse
programme.desc: 'And there shall be no more curse...' (Revelation 22:3). The curse of sin met its death at the Cross of Christ. Join Tracy Harris as he unpacks this truth to see miracles of wholeness and destinies restored in the Kingdom.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A distinctive blend of news from a biblical perspective, inspirational interviews with celebrities and unsung heroes, and biblical teaching for everyday life.

programme.title: Sparkling Gems With Rick Renner
programme.desc: Be inspired by the amazing cache of rich, enduring treasures mined from deep within the Word, unlocked by Rick Renner. This devotion is sure to inspire and provoke you to plunge deeper into God's Word.

programme.title: Grassroots With Angus Buchan
programme.desc: Angus, a farming evangelist, will take you back to the basics of Christianity, on this show, that is committed to the truth. Join Shalom Ministries as Angus shares a powerful, yet simple message straight out of the word of God.

programme.title: Empower Church
programme.desc: Join another revelatory word with Ps Gebhardt and Shannon Berndt, Senior Pastors of Empower Church.

programme.title: The Jewish Jesus With Rabbi Kirt...
programme.desc: 'The Jewish Jesus With Rabbi Kirt Schneider'. One of the few television ministries that focuses on the Judaic roots of the Christian faith and the connection between the Old and New Testaments.

programme.title: Faith Matters - André & Jenny
programme.desc: An inspiring program that brings practical, Godly wisdom straight into the hearts and minds of its viewers through enlightening discussions and dialogue between Dr André and Jenny Roebert.

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend.

programme.title: TPI
programme.desc: An inspirational, energetic and colourful television magazine program, hosted by Muyiwa Olarewaju. It spotlights the voices, insights and lives of Africans and people of African descent globally.

programme.title: Believer's Voice Of Victory
programme.desc: Kenneth and Gloria Copeland teach about faith, love, healing, prosperity, redemption, righteousness, the anointing and principles of victorious Christian living through the uncompromised Word of God.

programme.title: FlashPoint
programme.desc: Gene Bailey is joined by guests from the political arena, government and business officials as well as church leaders. Hear how prophecy and current events are ushering in the greatest awakening.

programme.title: Faith Today
programme.desc: Join Dr Andre and Jenny as they share exciting news and interview guests from all around the world.

programme.title: Hour Of Salvation - David Ibiyeomie
programme.desc: David Ibiyeomie is the presiding Pastor of Salvation Ministries. Pastor to millions across the globe, he is also a teacher and writer with the sole aim of impacting lives.

programme.title: Jonathan Shuttlesworth
programme.desc: Jonathan has been preaching the gospel full-time since May 2002. The nations of the world are overripe for revival - and we are determined to be a great part of it.

programme.title: Hosting The Supernatural
programme.desc: A talk show hosted by Apostle Nicky van der Westhuizen. The show features special guest interviews, musical performances, family and leadership insights, and segments on how to host the supernatural in our daily lives.

programme.title: Next Level with Katie Souza
programme.desc: Known for her insights on soul-healing, Katie Souza brings you Next Level. Through her teaching, writing and ministry on the process of soul-healing, she's witnessed and heard evidence of thousands of miracles worldwide.

programme.title: Creation Magazine Live!
programme.desc: Cutting-edge science that supports the Bible delivered in a non-technical, visually-rich, discussion-based format.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.desc: Excellence is the standard of life that Creflo insists on. His goal is to teach the Gospel of Jesus with simplicity and understanding, changing the world one person at a time.

programme.desc: Two naive government employees are used as a bait to distract russian agents.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A giant monster heads off to New York City and the American military must chase the monster across the city to stop it before it reproduces.

programme.title: Daisy Quokka: World's Scariest Animal
programme.desc: An unbearably adorable Quokka wants to achieve the impossible - to win the annual World's Scariest Animal Championship.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: When General M. Bison takes high-ranking hostages and demands $20 billion in ransom, he pushes an already incendiary crisis to the brink of global conflict.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince Of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin of Locksley comes back home to England to find his father dead in the ruins of his family estate, killed by the vicious sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: LAPD Detectives Martin Riggs, Roger Murtaugh, and Lorna Cole return to battle a the head of a Chinese Triad crime ring specialising in counterfeiting and modern-day slavery.

programme.title: A Time To Kill
programme.desc: Two low-life rednecks brag about their brutal rape of a ten-year-old black girl. The little girl's father takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Wake Of Death
programme.desc: After his wife is brutally murdered, club enforcer Ben Archer wages war against the Chinese triads.

programme.desc: After his wife is brutally murdered, club enforcer Ben Archer wages war against the Chinese triads.

programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Open Water 2: Adrift
programme.desc: Six long-time friends go on a cruise in a luxury yacht. Things go wrong when everybody jumps into the water, leaving only a baby on board...

programme.title: Willy Wonka & The Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Gene Wilder stars as Willy Wonka, madcap master of the amazing, but occasionally deadly, chocolate factory in this wondrous Roald Dahl adaptation.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: The sequel to the cult classic that made karate hip. This time, Daniel and Miyagi travel to Japan and get caught in an old feud with Miyagi's nemesis.

programme.title: Murder At 1600
programme.desc: A cop investigating a brutal killing at the White House makes some shocking discoveries that go all the way up to the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3

programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Debt Collectors
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors are thrust into an explosively dangerous situation, chasing down various lowlifes while also evading a vengeful kingpin.

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Samuel L. Jackson stars in this high-octane adventure set in the deep ocean as man-made sharks turn the tables on their creators.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Hairyman Of Port Chatham'. Bigfoot hunters investigate whether a huge, ape-like beast is responsible for a string of disappearances and mutilations in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bobby Mackey's Music World'. Jack Osbourne and Katrina Weidman travel to Wilder, Kentucky, to visit a honky-tonk. It is considered by many to be the most haunted place on earth.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Monsters Of The Deep'. Paul Beban searches for the truth about sea monsters. He travels to Vermont's Lake Champlain to see if an unclassified creature lurks in its dark depths.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Jersey Devil'. Paranormal investigations reveal stunning new evidence about the Jersey Devil, a monster that prowls the Pine Barrens of New Jersey.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - The Bat's Revenge'. Jack, Sharon, and Ozzy debate if mirrors can be haunted and whether aliens use cloud-cloaking technology. Plus, just how big are Bigfoot's feet?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Skull Of Doom And Dracula'. Don Wildman investigates a UFO crash in the heart of the Wild West. Plus, he reveals the true story behind the world's most notorious vampire.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend Of The Skinwalker'. A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence indicates it might be an alien.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Fractured'. High on his discovery with the Feldman's at the now named 'Americo Creek,' Americo reports back to the team at the miners meeting that he found 12 flakes of gold.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Arizona Anomalies'. A recent UFO sighting in Phoenix leads Chuck and the team to Sedona, AZ. They explore whether the area's energy vortexes act as portals for otherworldly visitors.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E3 - UFOs Over England'. In Zimbabwe Josh interviews witnesses to one of the largest ever UFO sightings. Then, in England, he examines a case known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Ancient Astronauts'. Did aliens help build the Pyramids? Or does the 'ancient astronauts' idea go back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenge religion and science?

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Social Clusters'. An ongoing series of UFO sightings off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to examine the link between UFOs, the military and the ocean.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E2 - Ancient Visitors'. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Freedom Balloon'. Don Wildman examines a wall that gave rise to daring escapes. He gazes at a star that marks a Hollywood scandal and honours the statue of a pioneering scientist.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Pickles Saves The World Cup'. Don Wildman goes to London to see a statue marking a huge moment in British sporting history. He also visits a Civil War battle site altered by a vandal.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Social Clusters'. An ongoing series of UFO sightings off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to examine the link between UFOs, the military and the ocean.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Hitting The Wall'. With time running out, the miners, physically and mentally drained, search for what they know is on Storø: rubies and sapphires. But will they come up trumps?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Deadly Cults'. Whether its religious fire-and-brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E4 - Roswell Revealed'. Josh's search for alien life ends in the USA, with a hot case in Arkansas. And, there's shocking new evidence in the Roswell crash.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Did Earth Have Two Moons?'. A starling discovery suggests the hellish clouds of Venus may be the origin of life on Earth. Plus, did the earth once have two moons?

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - A Life or Death Situation'. A teenager sneaks out of her home to go on a double date. But she soon finds herself attacked by what she believes is an aggressive dogman.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Horror Behind The Walls'. A 19th-century prison hides a chilling secret within its walls. A sealed door haunts a British museum and residents from the past roam a historic village.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Wildwood Sanitarium'. Nick and Katrina go to Wildwood Sanitorium. After its conversion into apartments, tenants reported an unnerving male presence and furniture being rearranged.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Statler City Hotel'. In their biggest investigation yet, Nick and Katrina spend 72 hours exploring the Statler City Hotel in Buffalo, NY - and uncover its sordid underground history.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S5/E207 of 257'. Morena makes risky moves for his ambitions and Bukhosi finds it hard to eat a large serving of humble pie.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 of 8 - Gaslight'. When a widowed single mother claims her dead husband is attempting to kill her from beyond the grave, McCall and the team help uncover the truth.

programme.title: Lingashoni
programme.desc: 'S2/E142 of 182'. Robert makes a damning confession about a baby. Puleng learns a nasty truth about Mandla. Seipati and an ex draw closer - it seems.

programme.title: The Chi
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 of 10'. Emmett's co-parenting struggles lead him to some questionable advice. Jake reconnects with someone from his past, while Kiesha's college housing plans go awry.

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 14'. Thembi joins Kiki to help with the house hunt but now to find something that Malcolm will also like. It's time for Mel's Diamond Nail Day and now everyone's wondering if Peet will show up.

programme.title: Koskuns Met Lientjie En Wilhelmina
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Lientjie Wessels en Wilhelmina Thirion Garção is lief vir alles wat magies en mooi is. In dié kosreeks reis hulle na asemrowende plekke wat dan as inspirasie sal dien vir hul unieke geregte.

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Selfdood, molestering en depressie. Die sanger en liedjieskrywer André Juan loop al 'n lang pad met depressie. 'n Telefoonoproep van 'n Facebook-aanhanger het sy lewe gered.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E1'. Tuis-tydskrif se ontrommel-span is terug en reg vir aksie! Carin en Jani help vir Wilanie Schoonbee om haar houtwerkkamer reg te pak sodat sy weer aan haar houtwerkprojekte kan werk.

programme.title: Pak Weg, Pak Reg
programme.desc: 'S3/E2'. Kinderkamers kan maklik handuit ruk, veral as 'n kleuter en tiener 'n kamer moet deel. Carin en Jani help vir Caryn Tities om 'n kinderkamer te verander in 'n kinderdroom.

programme.title: Sing In Harmonie
programme.desc: 'S2/E14'. Die grootste skoolkore-kompetisie is terug met koorsang van ons land se top skoolkore. Kom reis saam met ons deur die land op soek na die beste skoolkore in Suid-Afrika.

programme.title: Wys My 'n Huis
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. In hierdie episode is getroude paartjie Georgia en Toyce op soek na 'n stukkie hemel in Sable Hills. Maar eiendomsagent Cara het haar hande vol om met hul versoeke en uiteenlopende smake by te hou.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels vat dinge vas in Randfontein. Hulle help vir Roxy van Heerden dat haar slaapkamer haar persoonlikheid weerspieël.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Energiesake kom dié week onder die loep. Lynette Francis-Puren kuier by Koos Blanckenberg in die Swartland om te hoor hoe hulle oplossings inspan, hand-aan-hand met die natuur, om energie meer doeltreffend te gebruik.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E6'. Alan en Frances Webster het 30 jaar gelede met skaars 20 koeie naby Weenen in KZN begin melk. Vandag is daar meer as 1 200 koeie in produksie en dié egpaar woeker moedig voort.

programme.title: Nisboere
programme.desc: 'S7/E4'. Nisboere kuier by 'n kaasplaas aan die voet van die Magaliesberg. Ons ontmoet Nick Liebenberg van Laeveld Agrochem, en ons besoek 'n hidroponiese plaas op die dak van die Morningside-winkelsentrum.

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E11'. Sy liefde vir dwelms het sy drome om 'n sjef te word in die wiele gery, maar dít is nie al wat met Jermaine gebeur het nie. Sy lewe tuimel inmekaar soos wat dwelms die oorhand kry.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Privaatspeurder Luke Enslin vertel hoe hy op die spoor is van Richard Nel, 'n swendelaar wat mense van hul geld en besittings beroof.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Petré en Carina Prins en leer hoe hierdie hardwerkende Suid-Afrikaners 'n vervalle ou Franse huisie omskep in 'n oase van rustigheid.

programme.title: Gesondheid, Prontuit
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. Vind uit hoe Bazil Coetzee en Sonja Holz se lewens deur hartversaking omvergewerp is, en hul uitdagings om met hierdie kondisie saam te leef.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E6'. Sy het vir baie jare weeksdae in ons sitkamers gekuier as Emma in 7de Laan en nou kuier Bertha le Roux-Wahl in Minki se sitkamer. Sy vertel van haar loopbaan en ook van haar traumatiese jaar ná skool as au pair in België.

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Konings Van Kitskos
programme.desc: 'S7/E6'. Die konings kuier vandag in Sabie. Hulle besoek 'n restaurant wat jou sal laat voel asof jy elke dag die soustrein ry. Daarna gaan kyk hulle wat brou Sabie se gunsteling bierman.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Ware...
programme.desc: 'Huisgenoot Ware Lewensdramas: Vlees En Bloed. S1/E6'. Wat Rosemary Ndlovu se saak uniek maak, is dat sy die moorde van haar lewensmaat en vyf van haar familielede oor die tydperk van meer as vyf jaar haarfyn beplan het.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S2/E13'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Gesondheid, Prontuit
programme.desc: 'S3/E11'. Vind uit hoe Mark Titus en Brad Manson se lewens omvergewerp is ná 'n diagnose van nierversaking, en hul uitdagings om met hierdie kondisie saam te leef.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E7'. Wanneer jy Manuel Escórcio in Afrikaans hoor sing, sou jy nooit kon dink sy moedertaal is eintlik Portugees nie. Hy vertel van sy vroeë kinderjare in Mosambiek en hoe sy sangtalent ontdek is. Ons verras hom met 'n mede-sanger.

programme.title: Kies Die Lewe
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Angs, depressie en liggaamsdismorfie. Jeandré Hammond was nog altyd iemand wat geweldige druk op homself geplaas het en dit het tot baie angs gelei. Skakel in vir Jeandré se storie.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels kuier in Nigel. Hulle help vir Ilze Helberg om haar eetkamer 'n bietjie elegansie te gee.

programme.title: Konings Van Kitskos
programme.desc: 'S7/E7'. Die konings word soos sjeiks behandel by 'n restaurant geïnspireer deur die luukse koffiewinkels van Doebai. Daarna maak hulle hul kiewe nat by 'n nuwe 'craft'-distilleerdery in Boksburg.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Ware...
programme.desc: 'Huisgenoot Ware Lewensdramas: Vlees En Bloed. S1/E7'. Wanneer Wilmar Valentine skoolgronde betree en daarna Erin Fourie 22 keer met 'n mes steek, wonder die hele land wat regtig deur so 'n persoon se gedagtes gaan om dit te kan doen.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E7'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Is dit oukei om noemnaampies vir jou kind se geslagsdele te gee? Dr. Elna en die span ontleed en gesels oor dié onderwerp, en 'n vrou soek raad vir haar man wat nie meer in seks belangstel nie.

programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Depressie na lewensveranderende trauma. Na 'n duikongeluk op 26 het Tommy se lewe onherroeplik verander. Skakel in vir Tommy se storie op Kies die lewe met Ivor Swartz.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels kuier in Nigel. Hulle help vir Ilze Helberg om haar eetkamer 'n bietjie elegansie te gee.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Kookpunt
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Sjefs Simoné, Nick en sy vrou, Julandi, kook dit uit oor drie rondes om as Kookpunt-kampioen gekroon te word.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S18/E2'. Dit is 'n Pretoria-braai! Shaun en Sulette sit varkfilet-kebabs voor, terwyl Christo en Phillip beeshaas oor die kole gooi. Wynand en Elani bederf hul gaste met garnale.

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Dr. Elna en die span gesels oor endometriose en hoe 'n paartjie dit in die slaapkamer kan hanteer. 'n Seun het kondome by die skool gekry, en 'n ander paartjie soek idees vir intimiteit in hul langafstandverhouding.

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E12'. David word as kind geboelie omdat hy nie vir homself kan opstaan nie, en word dan self 'n boelie om homself te verdedig. Baie lewens word verwoes in die proses.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E99 of 260 - The Good Samaritan'. Lindani offers to help Nomonde save the day and Flora is full of surprises.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E100 of 260 - Born Again (2)'. Zweli makes a shocking discovery about Nomonde and Zolani is left off-kilter by all the changes in his life.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Ingadi
programme.desc: A greedy domestic worker wants to dig up a trunk full of money buried in her employer's garden. Things go awry when the neighbourhood servants want a share of the money.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Nyaope Indaba
programme.desc: A group of nyaope addicts gets together to smoke, get high and pass out. But then they wake up to find a dead body next to them. Who could be responsible?

programme.title: Gospel 10 At 10
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 of 31'. We bring you a count down of your favorite top ten gospel hits. Only on Mzansi Wethu.

programme.title: Gospel 10 At 10
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 of 31'. We bring you a count down of your favorite top ten gospel hits. Only on Mzansi Wethu.

programme.desc: 'S2/E33 of 39'. The lively animal kingdom twins, Tjiff and Tjaff, are very inquisitive! They can't wait to play outside each day. But what can they do outside? Come and play with Tjiff and Tjaff.

programme.title: Trixi
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 of 20'. Trixi plays on the computer to learn more about wild animals and plants.

programme.title: Rat-Tat-Tat
programme.desc: 'S1/E33 of 61'. The clever antelope and skunk are travelling through the country. They discover all sorts of interesting places and meet a lot of friends along the way.

programme.title: Zim Zim
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 of 312'. Zim Zim is an ordinary six-year-old boy who shrinks when he makes a mistake. He goes to a secret place where he learns not to make the same mistake again.

programme.title: Froggies
